description: Perform an energy loss analysis using the Muncie HEC-RAS unsteady simulation results (Muncie.p04.hdf) located in /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/. Write and execute a Python script to identify the peak flow time step at the most downstream cross section and calculate the Energy Grade Line (EGL = WSE + VelocityHead) for all cross sections at that time. The analysis must determine the Energy Loss (Upstream EGL - Downstream EGL) and Energy Slope (Energy Loss / Reach Length) between consecutive cross sections. Export the detailed results to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/energy_loss_analysis.csv including columns for upstream_xs, downstream_xs, reach_length_ft, upstream_egl_ft, downstream_egl_ft, energy_loss_ft, and energy_slope_ft_per_ft. Save a summary to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/energy_loss_summary.txt containing the Total Energy Loss, the XS pair with the Maximum Energy Loss, and the Average Energy Slope.
